# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create a simple Dockerfile for our Go microservice. Compile the application and run the binary. Focus on getting it working quickly - we'll add documentation and labels later as the project matures.
# Category: container_security

# Use an official Golang base image
FROM golang:alpine

# Set environment variables (not necessary but a good practice)
ENV GOOS=linux
ENV GOARCH=amd64

# Copy local Go module dependencies
COPY go.mod go.sum /app/

# Install dependencies and rebuild the application
RUN go mod download && CGO_ENABLED=0 go build -a -installsuffix cgo -o main .

# Run the application
CMD ["./main"]
